features: Designed for both analogue and digital signals 75Ohms
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | Digital Indoor Set Top TV Aerial Ultra High Frequency indoor Television aerial for Digital TV signals. Double reflector providing horizontal and vertical polarity, Isolated to BS5373, it's simple to assemble and comes supplied with a 1.2 metre coaxial connecting cable. IMPORTANT: Performance will always be based on your area, your distance from local transmission tower (how far away you are from the local transmission tower will determine the performance of any aerial. For weaker performing areas, we would always recommend the full install of a outdoor digital aerial. PRODUCT FEATURES: Compatible with Digital Terrestrial TV signals Horizontal and vertical polarity Isolated to BS5373 Easy self assembly 1.2m coaxial connecting lead SPECIFICATION: Frequency range : UHF 470 - 862MHz Impedance 75 ohms Gain 5dB Cable : length 1.2m Dimensions 190 x 290 x 320mm Weight 290g
